title: Enforce deterministic transform/render/hit-test/compositing rules in runtime
notes: Transform order fixed: `T_parent * T_attachment * T_motion * T_component`.
Render order: planes by ascending k_hat_index with camera(k=0) last; components by z_local asc, mount_order asc, component_id asc.
Hit-test order is reverse draw order; compositing absolute overwrite, delta add+clamp [0,255].
